objective: Audit fresh public Kaggle and Hugging Face source candidates for attachable exact-underlying MainRegimeV2 parent-root labels or direct Manipulation rows without disturbing concurrent board edits.

missing_slot_contract.hard_acceptance_boundary: exact provider or exact underlying, exact timeframe, source-backed/manual/official Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis windows; HMM/GMM/OHLCV/technical/future-return/proxy labels remain rejected

candidates.observed_shape: BTCUSD/BTCUSDT 5m and 15m rows with OHLCV, technical indicators, integer HMM states, and post-hoc semantic regime strings such as Squeeze/Range/Strong Trend
candidates.reason: HMM-derived state labels and technical-indicator/OHLCV provenance are explicitly forbidden as independent MainRegimeV2 parent-root source labels; exchange is unspecified and labels are not Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis windows

candidates.observed_shape: Synthetic crypto market microstructure set with BTC/ETH/SOL and other assets, bear/crab/bull period labels, liquidation rows, funding rates, and cross-exchange spread columns
candidates.reason: dataset description states synthetic generation/reproducibility; not a real Kraken parent-root label panel or real direct Manipulation positive/negative row source; crab would require Sideways crosswalk but provenance is simulated

candidates.observed_shape: Daily yfinance/FRED feature panel for SPY, QQQ, GLD, USO, BTC-USD, volatility, spreads, RSI, rolling volatility, and drawdown
candidates.reason: features are useful sidecars only; no independent Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis source-label windows; daily frequency also does not fill current intraday/monthly gaps

candidates.observed_shape: NIFTY 500 daily HMM market/behavior regimes with Durable/Calm/Choppy/Stress and technical features
candidates.reason: off-contract instrument universe and HMM-derived labels; not exact current yfinance/Kraken instruments/timeframes and not source-backed MainRegimeV2 parent roots

candidates.observed_shape: Daily large-cap technology stock data with SMA/volatility features and Bull/Bear/Sideways trend labels
candidates.reason: labels are moving-average crossover trend labels for AAPL/MSFT/GOOG/AMZN/META, not current missing exact instruments or Crisis root coverage

candidates.observed_shape: Bybit spot/perpetual OHLCV for many symbols and 5m/15m/1h/4h/1D timeframes with optional future-return labels
candidates.reason: raw OHLCV/future-return labels and Bybit venue mismatch; cannot satisfy Kraken exact-provider parent-root labels or direct Manipulation row schema

candidates.observed_shape: Weekly S&P 500/VIX/yield-spread feature table for comparative GMM/HMM regime discovery
candidates.reason: explicitly intended for unsupervised GMM/HMM discovery and lacks predefined independent economic labels; no current missing intraday/monthly slots

candidates.observed_shape: Small benchmark-style macro regime transition rows with date windows, textual macro context, current regime basin, and transition probabilities
candidates.reason: not exact instrument/provider/timeframe rows; labels are benchmark task basins such as macro_rates/risk_off, not MainRegimeV2 root windows

next_action: Escalate acquisition away from public generic regime-search surfaces: obtain exact provider/instrument/timeframe label windows via private/exported labels, or add a source-adapter only if the owner explicitly permits a provider/venue crosswalk from non-Kraken crypto sources.
